free_text: Structure of 7Be.
(I) The 6Li(p,p')6Li* reaction
- Tables; technical details
- Elastic
scattering of protons by Li6 (same data in Table 1 of
thesis)
(II) The 6Li(p,p")6Li** and 4He(3He,p")6Li** reactions
ONR-CIT
Targets of 6Li (isotopic abundance
99%) with the thickness from 70 to 300 ug/cm2 were
evaporated in situ on 500 Angstr. thick nickel foils.
These were mounted over 7.9-mm diameter holes punched
in 0.18-mm thick tantalum.
Two silicon surface-barrier detectors, each
with a resolution of about 40 to 50 keV, were used.
One at a fixed angle as a target monitor.
Compilation produced by Arzamas RFNC-VNIIEF

tabulated data from thesis. Corrections in all Subents.

Subent 001.
The standard error in the normalization
Systematic errors caused by geometrical
inaccuracies in the scattering chamber, and in some
cases, by relative normalization errors in data taken
with different targets.
